title: Hire, fire, final - Chelsea's player power may be ugly, but it wins
summary: Chelsea has advanced to the FA Cup final, though their path there highlighted internal tensions under manager Liam Rosenior. The team's performance suggests that player power may be overriding managerial authority, raising questions about sustainable team dynamics.
content: Chelsea are in another FA Cup final - but only after their players showed up in a way they were no longer doing for Liam Rosenior, writes Phil McNulty.

zh.title: 招聘、解雇、决赛 - 切尔西的球员权力可能很丑陋，但它奏效了
zh.summary: 切尔西已经晋级足总杯决赛，尽管他们的晋级之路凸显了主教练利亚姆·罗森尼奥尔领导下的内部紧张局势。球队的表现表明球员权力可能凌驾于教练权威之上，引发了关于可持续团队动态的问题。

title: Williamson calls for Arsenal 'intensity' in second leg
summary: Arsenal's captain Leah Williamson stressed the need for tactical precision and defensive discipline as the team prepares for the second leg of their Women's Champions League semi-final against Lyon. The statement suggests Arsenal holds an advantage that requires careful management in the away fixture.
content: Leah Williamson believes Arsenal will have to be "really clinical" and "defensively secure" if they are to maintain their lead in the second leg of their Women's Champions League semi-final away to Lyon.

zh.title: 威廉森呼吁阿森纳在第二回合"强度"
zh.summary: 阿森纳队长莱亚·威廉森强调了在球队为对阵里昂的女子欧冠半决赛第二回合做准备时，对战术精准性和防守纪律的需要。这一声明表明阿森纳拥有需要在客场比赛中仔细管理的优势。

title: Fernandez fires Chelsea to FA Cup final showdown with Man City
summary: Enzo Fernandez's first-half goal secured Chelsea a 1-0 victory over Leeds United in the FA Cup semi-final at Wembley Stadium. The win sets up a final against Manchester City and advances Chelsea's pursuit of major silverware this season.
content: Enzo Fernandez' first-half header gives Chelsea a 1-0 win over Leeds United in the semi-final of the FA Cup at Wembley Stadium.

zh.title: 费尔南德斯射门送切尔西进入足总杯决赛对阵曼城
zh.summary: 恩佐·费尔南德斯的上半场进球确保切尔西在温布利球场的足总杯半决赛中以1-0战胜利兹联队。这场胜利为与曼彻斯特城的决赛奠定了基础，推进了切尔西本赛季追逐主要荣誉的步伐。

title: Three into two - battle to reach WSL goes to final day
summary: The WSL 2 promotion race remains wide open heading into the final matchday, with three teams—Birmingham City, Crystal Palace, and Charlton Athletic—all capable of securing automatic promotion. The tight competition highlights the uncertainty and intensity of the league's conclusion.
content: Just one matchday remains in the WSL 2 and Birmingham City, Crystal Palace and Charlton Athletic could all secure automatic promotion.

zh.title: 三队争两席 - 英冠最后一轮争夺升级权
zh.summary: WSL 2级升级竞争在进入最后一轮前仍悬念未决，伯明翰城、水晶宫和查尔顿竞技三支球队都有机会获得自动升级资格。激烈的竞争凸显了联赛收官阶段的不确定性和强度。

title: Arsenal capitalise on defensive errors  to secure first leg win over Lyon
summary: Arsenal defeated Lyon 2-1 in the first leg of their Women's Champions League semi-final at the Emirates Stadium, capitalizing on defensive mistakes to overturn an early deficit. The away leg in France will determine whether Arsenal advances to the final.
content: Arsenal pounce on a pair of defensive errors to come from behind to defeat Lyon 2-1 at the Emirates Stadium, in the first leg of their Women's Champions League semi-final.

zh.title: 阿森纳利用防线失误击败里昂 赢得半决赛首回合
zh.summary: 阿森纳在埃米利亚特体育场以2比1击败里昂，赢得女性欧冠半决赛首回合，利用防线错误逆转早期落后。法国的客场比赛将决定阿森纳是否进入决赛。

title: How 10 Premier League teams can qualify for Europe
summary: An analysis explores the mathematical possibility of ten Premier League teams earning European qualification, a scenario that would represent unprecedented breadth in continental competition spots. The scenario, while unlikely, highlights how closely contested the middle of the Premier League table has become.
content: Ten Premier League teams in Europe? It sounds preposterous, but it is not as far-fetched as it seems.

zh.title: 英超10支球队如何获得欧洲参赛资格
zh.summary: 一项分析探讨了英超十支球队获得欧洲参赛资格的数学可能性，这将代表大陆竞争名额前所未有的广泛分布。虽然这种情况不太可能，但突显了英超积分榜中游球队的竞争有多激烈。

title: Man Utd's Champions League hopes dealt a blow in stalemate with Tottenham
summary: Manchester United drew 0-0 with Tottenham Hotspur, a result that leaves the Red Devils four points behind second-placed Chelsea with just two matches remaining. The draw significantly diminishes United's chances of securing Champions League qualification.
content: Manchester United's Champions League hopes were dealt a heavy blow after a 0-0 draw with Tottenham Hotspur to leave the Red Devils four points behind second-placed Chelsea, with two games to play.

zh.title: 曼联在与热刺的平手中欧冠希望受挫
zh.summary: 曼联与托特纳姆热刺0-0战平，这个结果使红魔队落后第二名切尔西4分，仅剩两场比赛。这场平局大大降低了曼联获得欧冠资格的机会。

title: Smith capitalises on defensive mix-up from Lyon
summary: Olivia Smith capitalized on a goalkeeping error by Lyon's Christiane Endler to give Arsenal the lead in their Women's Champions League semi-final first leg. The goal exemplifies how defensive lapses can prove decisive in high-stakes European competition.
content: OL Lyonnes goalkeeper Christiane Endler is involved in another mix-up at the back against Arsenal as she crashes into Ingrid Syrstad Engen to allow Olivia Smith to give the Gunners the lead in the first leg of their Women's Champions League semi-final tie.

zh.title: 史密斯利用里昂防线混乱破门
zh.summary: 奥利维亚·史密斯利用里昂门神克里斯蒂亚娜·恩德勒的失误，为阿森纳在女性欧冠半决赛首回合中先进一球。这个进球展示了防线漏洞如何在高水准欧洲比赛中成为决定性因素。

title: Crucial win over Liverpool lifts West Ham away from relegation danger
summary: West Ham secured a 1-0 away victory over Liverpool through an own goal by Cornelia Kapocs, moving seven points clear of the WSL relegation play-off zone. The result significantly improves West Ham's prospects of avoiding a relegation battle.
content: A Cornelia Kapocs own goal is enough for West Ham to secure a 1-0 away win over Liverpool, as the East London side move seven points clear of the relegation play-off place in the WSL.

zh.title: 战胜利物浦的关键胜利使西汉姆脱离降级危险
zh.summary: 西汉姆通过科尼莉亚·卡波奇的乌龙球在客场以1-0战胜利物浦，领先女超联赛降级附加赛区7分。这个结果大大改善了西汉姆避免降级的前景。

title: Italian referee chief suspends himself over allegations
summary: Italy's top-flight referee assignment chief has suspended himself amid allegations that he is under investigation for sporting fraud. The development raises concerns about the integrity of match officiating in Serie A.
content: The man in charge of assigning referees in Italy's top flight suspends himself after it is alleged he is under investigation for sporting fraud.

zh.title: 意大利主裁判长因指控自行禁赛
zh.summary: 意大利顶级联赛主裁判分配主管因涉嫌体育欺诈调查而自行禁赛。这一进展引发了对意甲比赛裁判完整性的担忧。

title: Police 'aware' of video appearing to show York player punching fan
summary: Police are investigating a video that allegedly shows a York City player punching a spectator during the club's 1-1 draw with Rochdale. The incident raises serious concerns about player conduct and fan safety at matches.
content: Police say they are aware of a video circulating online that appears to show a York City player punching a fan during the club's dramatic 1-1 draw with Rochdale on Saturday.

zh.title: 警方"知悉"约克城球员殴打球迷视频
zh.summary: 警方正在调查一段视频，该视频据称显示约克城球员在与罗奇代尔进行1-1平手比赛期间殴打观众。该事件引发了对球员行为和比赛中球迷安全的严重担忧。

title: What Wrexham, Hull and Derby need in top-six race
summary: With the Championship season nearing its conclusion, BBC Sport outlines the specific requirements for Wrexham, Hull City, and Derby County to secure play-off spots in the final matchday. Each team faces different challenges in their push for promotion contention.
content: BBC Sport analyses what Wrexham, Hull City and Derby County need on the final day of the Championship season to secure a play-off spot.

zh.title: 雷克瑟姆、赫尔城和德比郡在前六名竞争中需要什么
zh.summary: 随着英冠赛季即将结束，BBC体育概述了雷克瑟姆、赫尔城和德比郡在最后一轮比赛中确保附加赛席位的具体要求。每支球队在争取晋级竞争中都面临不同的挑战。

title: Why Rashford must be patient over Barcelona future
summary: Marcus Rashford continues to pursue his Barcelona transfer dream despite current challenges, with Spanish football expert analysis suggesting patience is key. His determination reflects ongoing ambition to make the high-profile move. This matters as it shows the complexity of transfer negotiations involving elite European clubs.
content: Marcus Rashford is not ready to give up on his Barcelona dream just yet, writes Spanish football expert Guillem Balague.

zh.title: 为什么拉什福德必须耐心等待巴塞罗那的前景
zh.summary: 尽管面临当前挑战，马库斯·拉什福德继续追求他的巴塞罗那转会梦想，西班牙足球专家的分析表明耐心是关键。他的决心反映了进行这项高调转会的持续雄心。这很重要，因为它表明了涉及欧洲顶级俱乐部的转会谈判的复杂性。

title: Celtic consider move for manager Frank - gossip
summary: Celtic are exploring a managerial appointment, though their primary target may be unavailable, with another Scottish manager potentially heading to Serie A instead. The managerial search highlights the competitive nature of football recruitment. This matters because coaching changes can significantly reshape a club's tactical direction and performance.
content: Celtic managerial target may be beyond reach, with another Scot possibly on the way to Serie A...

zh.title: 凯尔特人考虑任命主教练弗兰克 - 八卦
zh.summary: 凯尔特人正在寻求任命一位主教练，虽然他们的首选目标可能无法获得，另一位苏格兰主教练可能反而前往意甲。这项主教练搜索突显了足球招聘的竞争性。这很重要，因为教练变动可以显著改变俱乐部的战术方向和表现。

title: What's on the line as WSL reaches business end?
summary: The Women's Super League enters its final games with the title, European qualification, relegation and promotion spots still unresolved. BBC Sport analyzes how these decisive matches will determine multiple significant outcomes. This matters because the compressed final stretch creates high stakes for numerous clubs across different competition objectives.
content: BBC Sport analyses the state of play in the Women's Super League with only a handful of games to go and the title, European qualification, relegation and promotion still to be decided.

zh.title: 当女超联赛进入关键阶段时，什么处于危险中
zh.summary: 女子超级联赛进入其最后几场比赛，冠军头衔、欧洲资格、降级和升级名额仍未确定。BBC体育分析这些决定性比赛将如何决定多项重要结果。这很重要，因为压缩的最后阶段为不同竞争目标的众多俱乐部创造了高风险。

title: Quiet confidence, then tears - but 'unsinkable' Coventry are back
summary: Coventry City's resurgence resonates emotionally with long-suffering supporters who witnessed the club's 2001 top-flight relegation. BBC Sport documents three teenagers' journeys from that traumatic moment to the current revival. This matters because it illustrates how sports clubs embody community identity and the significance of redemption narratives.
content: BBC Sport speaks to three teenagers who were in the crowd when Coventry were relegated from the top flight in 2001.

zh.title: 静悄悄的信心，然后是泪水——但"坚不可摧"的考文垂回来了
zh.summary: 考文垂城市队的复兴在长期受苦的球迷中引起了情感共鸣，他们见证了俱乐部在2001年从顶级联赛降级的经历。BBC体育记录了三位青少年从那个创伤时刻到当前复兴的历程。这很重要，因为它说明了体育俱乐部如何体现社区认同感和救赎叙事的重要性。

title: FA Cup game: Create a Chelsea v Leeds prediction by answering our prompts
summary: BBC Sport's interactive prediction tool lets fans forecast the Chelsea v Leeds FA Cup semi-final by answering questions processed through their supercomputer model. The engagement tool merges fan participation with data-driven analysis. This matters because it demonstrates how modern sports coverage integrates analytics and audience interaction.
content: Answer our seven simple questions and get a prediction from the BBC Sport supercomputer for Saturday's FA Cup semi-final between Chelsea and Leeds.

zh.title: 足总杯比赛：通过回答我们的问题来预测切尔西对利兹的比赛
zh.summary: BBC体育的交互式预测工具让球迷通过回答由其超级计算机模型处理的问题来预测切尔西对利兹的足总杯半决赛。该参与工具将球迷参与与数据驱动分析相结合。这很重要，因为它展示了现代体育报道如何整合分析和观众互动。

title: Why being in an FA Cup semi-final means so much to Leeds fans
summary: Leeds United's FA Cup semi-final against Chelsea holds deep significance for the club's long-suffering supporters. The match represents a major opportunity for the club to advance in a prestigious competition.
content: BBC Sport looks at why the FA Cup semi-final against Chelsea means so much to long-suffering Leeds United fans.

zh.title: 为什么足总杯半决赛对利兹联球迷意义重大
zh.summary: 利兹联与切尔西的足总杯半决赛对这家俱乐部备受折磨的球迷具有深远意义。这场比赛代表了俱乐部在这项声望竞赛中向前推进的重大机会。
